requirement_topic.en: Market Access — UNBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC), Certificate of Conformity (CoC) and Q-Mark / Import Inspection
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——UNBS出口前符合性验证（PVoC）、符合性证书（CoC）及Q标志/进口检验
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——UNBS出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）、符合性證書（CoC）及Q標誌/進口檢驗

summary.en: Regulated products imported into Uganda, including household refrigerating appliances, are subject to the Uganda National Bureau of Standards (UNBS) Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme. Under PVoC, a UNBS-appointed inspection agency (operating in the country of export, including China) verifies that the consignment meets the applicable UNBS-adopted standards before shipment and issues a Certificate of Conformity (CoC). A valid CoC is required for customs clearance at the Uganda destination; consignments arriving without a CoC face destination inspection, testing, penalties, or refusal. PVoC offers route options typically including per-consignment verification, product registration, or supplier licensing for repeat shippers. After clearance, UNBS exercises import inspection and market surveillance, and domestically certified products may carry the UNBS Distinctive Mark (Q-Mark). Because Uganda is landlocked, refrigerators usually transit via the Port of Mombasa (Kenya) or Dar es Salaam (Tanzania) and move inland under transit procedures; the CoC must accompany the goods through clearance.
summary.zh: 进口到乌干达的受监管产品（包括家用制冷器具）须纳入乌干达国家标准局（UNBS）出口前符合性验证（PVoC）方案。在PVoC下，UNBS委任的检验机构（在出口国运营，包括中国）在出货前核实货物符合适用的UNBS采用标准，并签发符合性证书（CoC）。有效CoC是乌干达目的地海关清关所必需的；无CoC到货的货物将面临目的地检验、检测、罚款或拒绝入境。PVoC通常提供路径选项，包括逐批验证、产品注册或针对重复发货商的供应商许可。清关后，UNBS实施进口检验及市场监管，国内认证产品可加贴UNBS特别标志（Q标志）。由于乌干达为内陆国家，电冰箱通常经蒙巴萨港（肯尼亚）或达累斯萨拉姆港（坦桑尼亚）转运并按转关程序运往内陆；CoC须随货物通过清关。
summary.zht: 進口到烏干達的受監管產品（包括家用製冷器具）須納入烏干達國家標準局（UNBS）出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）方案。在PVoC下，UNBS委任的檢驗機構（在出口國運營，包括中國）在出貨前核實貨物符合適用的UNBS採用標準，並簽發符合性證書（CoC）。有效CoC是烏干達目的地海關清關所必需的；無CoC到貨的貨物將面臨目的地檢驗、檢測、罰款或拒絕入境。PVoC通常提供路徑選項，包括逐批驗證、產品註冊或針對重複發貨商的供應商許可。清關後，UNBS實施進口檢驗及市場監管，國內認證產品可加貼UNBS特別標誌（Q標誌）。由於烏干達為內陸國家，電冰箱通常經蒙巴薩港（肯尼亞）或達累斯薩拉姆港（坦桑尼亞）轉運並按轉關程序運往內陸；CoC須隨貨物通過清關。

standards_or_laws: UNBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme — mandatory pre-shipment verification for regulated imports via UNBS-appointed inspection agency
Certificate of Conformity (CoC) — required for customs clearance into Uganda; route options typically per-consignment / registration / licensing
UNBS Act (Cap.) and import-inspection regime — destination inspection, market surveillance, and UNBS Distinctive Mark (Q-Mark)
Transit via Port of Mombasa (Kenya) or Dar es Salaam (Tanzania) — landlocked routing under transit procedures

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before domestic sale, plus China Energy Label display (GB 12021.2). CCC is a mandatory third-party certification issued by CNCA-designated certification bodies and is oriented to the Chinese domestic market — it is not a pre-export consignment-verification scheme and does not produce a Uganda-recognised Certificate of Conformity. There is no Chinese-side equivalent to a destination-country PVoC/CoC obligation; the closest functional analogue is the export inspection that may apply to certain goods, but it does not satisfy UNBS PVoC. The CCC certificate and test reports are useful supporting evidence within a PVoC application but are not themselves the Uganda conformity document.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具在国内销售前须取得涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）的中国强制认证（CCC），并展示中国能效标识（GB 12021.2）。CCC为由CNCA指定认证机构签发的强制性第三方认证，面向中国国内市场——并非出口前逐批验证方案，且不产生乌干达认可的符合性证书。中方不存在与目的国PVoC/CoC义务等同的制度；功能上最接近的是某些货物可能适用的出口检验，但其不满足UNBS PVoC。CCC证书及检测报告在PVoC申请中是有用的支撑证据，但本身不是乌干达符合性文件。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具在國內銷售前須取得涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）的中國強制認證（CCC），並展示中國能效標識（GB 12021.2）。CCC為由CNCA指定認證機構簽發的強制性第三方認證，面向中國國內市場——並非出口前逐批驗證方案，且不產生烏干達認可的符合性證書。中方不存在與目的國PVoC/CoC義務等同的制度；功能上最接近的是某些貨物可能適用的出口檢驗，但其不滿足UNBS PVoC。CCC證書及檢測報告在PVoC申請中是有用的支撐證據，但本身不是烏干達符合性文件。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR; domestic-market oriented
China Energy Label — based on GB 12021.2-2015 (NDRC/SAMR)

gap.en: This is a structural market-access gap: Chinese exporters must enrol the consignment in UNBS PVoC and obtain a Certificate of Conformity before shipment — CCC and the China Energy Label do not substitute. Practical steps: (1) engage the UNBS-appointed PVoC inspection agency in China and select a route (per-consignment, product registration, or supplier licensing for repeat exporters); (2) submit IEC-based test reports (IEC 60335-2-24 safety, CISPR 14 EMC, IEC 62552 energy), preferably an IECEE CB Scheme report, plus the commercial documents; (3) obtain the CoC, which must accompany the goods for customs clearance — arriving without a CoC triggers destination inspection, testing, penalties, or refusal. Because Uganda is landlocked, build in transit time and ensure the CoC and transit documentation are consistent through Mombasa or Dar es Salaam. After clearance, UNBS import inspection and market surveillance apply, and the UNBS Q-Mark route may be relevant for goods placed on the domestic market.
gap.zh: 这是结构性市场准入差距：中国出口商须将货物纳入UNBS PVoC并在出货前取得符合性证书——CCC及中国能效标识不可替代。实务步骤：（1）在中国对接UNBS委任的PVoC检验机构并选择路径（逐批、产品注册，或针对重复出口商的供应商许可）；（2）提交IEC基础检测报告（IEC 60335-2-24安全、CISPR 14 EMC、IEC 62552能效），最好为IECEE CB体系报告，并附商业文件；（3）取得CoC，须随货物用于海关清关——无CoC到货将触发目的地检验、检测、罚款或拒绝入境。由于乌干达为内陆国家，须预留转运时间，并确保CoC及转关文件经蒙巴萨或达累斯萨拉姆全程一致。清关后适用UNBS进口检验及市场监管，投放国内市场的货物可能涉及UNBS Q标志路径。
gap.zht: 這是結構性市場准入差距：中國出口商須將貨物納入UNBS PVoC並在出貨前取得符合性證書——CCC及中國能效標識不可替代。實務步驟：（1）在中國對接UNBS委任的PVoC檢驗機構並選擇路徑（逐批、產品註冊，或針對重複出口商的供應商許可）；（2）提交IEC基礎檢測報告（IEC 60335-2-24安全、CISPR 14 EMC、IEC 62552能效），最好為IECEE CB體系報告，並附商業文件；（3）取得CoC，須隨貨物用於海關清關——無CoC到貨將觸發目的地檢驗、檢測、罰款或拒絕入境。由於烏干達為內陸國家，須預留轉運時間，並確保CoC及轉關文件經蒙巴薩或達累斯薩拉姆全程一致。清關後適用UNBS進口檢驗及市場監管，投放國內市場的貨物可能涉及UNBS Q標誌路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UNBS PVoC and a valid Certificate of Conformity (CoC) are required for customs clearance of regulated imports into Uganda; no CoC means destination inspection, penalties, or refusal
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for the domestic market — CCC (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label required before sale in China; not a destination-country PVoC/CoC equivalent

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UNBS PVoC and a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) are a hard market-access gate for refrigerators entering Uganda — a Chinese CCC certificate does not substitute. Enrol the consignment with the UNBS-appointed PVoC agency in China, submit IEC-based test reports (ideally an IECEE CB report), obtain the CoC, and ensure it accompanies the goods through clearance (landlocked transit via Mombasa or Dar es Salaam). Goods without a CoC face destination inspection, penalties, or refusal.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UNBS PVoC及符合性证书（CoC）是电冰箱进入乌干达的强制市场准入门槛——中国CCC证书不可替代。须在中国对接UNBS委任的PVoC机构办理货物登记，提交IEC基础检测报告（最好为IECEE CB报告），取得CoC，并确保其随货物通过清关（内陆经蒙巴萨或达累斯萨拉姆转运）。无CoC的货物将面临目的地检验、罚款或拒绝入境。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UNBS PVoC及符合性證書（CoC）是電冰箱進入烏干達的強制市場准入門檻——中國CCC證書不可替代。須在中國對接UNBS委任的PVoC機構辦理貨物登記，提交IEC基礎檢測報告（最好為IECEE CB報告），取得CoC，並確保其隨貨物通過清關（內陸經蒙巴薩或達累斯薩拉姆轉運）。無CoC的貨物將面臨目的地檢驗、罰款或拒絕入境。

requirement_topic.en: Importer of Record — In-Country Importer for Clearance, UNBS Inspection and Market Surveillance
requirement_topic.zh: 进口责任主体——清关、UNBS检验及市场监管的在地进口商
requirement_topic.zht: 進口責任主體——清關、UNBS檢驗及市場監管的在地進口商

summary.en: Goods placed on the Uganda market require an in-country importer of record — a Uganda-registered business that imports the consignment, is responsible to customs (Uganda Revenue Authority) and to UNBS for the imported products, and is the local point of contact for import inspection, market surveillance, and any corrective action. The in-country importer typically holds a Taxpayer Identification Number (TIN), handles the customs entry and duties/VAT, and presents the Certificate of Conformity (CoC) at clearance. For regulated electrical appliances such as refrigerators, the importer is the operator answerable to UNBS for the product's conformity on the domestic market. A Chinese manufacturer selling into Uganda must therefore work through (or establish) a Uganda-resident importer; logistics agents and customs brokers facilitate clearance but the registered importer carries the product-responsibility role.
summary.zh: 投放乌干达市场的货物须有在地进口责任主体——一家在乌干达注册的企业，负责进口该货物，对海关（乌干达税务局）及UNBS就进口产品负责，并作为进口检验、市场监管及任何纠正措施的本地联系点。在地进口商通常持有纳税人识别号（TIN），办理海关申报及关税/增值税，并在清关时出示符合性证书（CoC）。对于电冰箱等受监管电气器具，进口商是就产品在国内市场符合性向UNBS负责的运营主体。因此，向乌干达销售的中国制造商须通过（或设立）一家乌干达本地进口商；物流代理及报关行协助清关，但注册进口商承担产品责任角色。
summary.zht: 投放烏干達市場的貨物須有在地進口責任主體——一家在烏干達註冊的企業，負責進口該貨物，對海關（烏干達稅務局）及UNBS就進口產品負責，並作為進口檢驗、市場監管及任何糾正措施的本地聯繫點。在地進口商通常持有納稅人識別號（TIN），辦理海關申報及關稅/增值稅，並在清關時出示符合性證書（CoC）。對於電冰箱等受監管電氣器具，進口商是就產品在國內市場符合性向UNBS負責的運營主體。因此，向烏干達銷售的中國製造商須通過（或設立）一家烏干達本地進口商；物流代理及報關行協助清關，但註冊進口商承擔產品責任角色。

standards_or_laws: Uganda Revenue Authority (URA) customs entry — importer of record with Taxpayer Identification Number (TIN) responsible for duties/VAT and customs declaration
UNBS import-inspection and market-surveillance regime — in-country importer answerable for product conformity on the domestic market
Certificate of Conformity (CoC) presented by the importer at clearance

summary.en: China has no regulatory obligation requiring an export manufacturer to appoint a destination-country resident importer-of-record responsible for product conformity and market surveillance in the importing country. Under the domestic CCC regime, the certificate holder is the party responsible for conformity in the Chinese market; this role does not extend to or satisfy the Uganda in-country importer requirement. Chinese exporters appoint overseas distributors or buyers on a commercial basis, but the statutory product-responsibility-of-importer concept is a destination-country (Uganda) requirement with no direct Chinese-law analogue for exports.
summary.zh: 中国没有要求出口制造商指定一名在进口国负责产品符合性及市场监管的目的国本地进口责任主体的监管义务。在国内CCC制度下，认证持有人为对中国市场符合性负责的主体；该角色不延伸至、亦不满足乌干达在地进口商要求。中国出口商以商业形式委任海外经销商或买方，但进口商法定产品责任的概念属于目的国（乌干达）要求，在出口方面无直接的中国法律类似规定。
summary.zht: 中國沒有要求出口製造商指定一名在進口國負責產品符合性及市場監管的目的國本地進口責任主體的監管義務。在國內CCC制度下，認證持有人為對中國市場符合性負責的主體；該角色不延伸至、亦不滿足烏干達在地進口商要求。中國出口商以商業形式委任海外經銷商或買方，但進口商法定產品責任的概念屬於目的國（烏干達）要求，在出口方面無直接的中國法律類似規定。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent requiring a destination-country importer of record for exports

gap.en: Structural gap with no Chinese analogue: a Chinese refrigerator manufacturer cannot place goods on the Uganda market without a Uganda-resident importer of record. The importer (with a URA TIN) lodges the customs entry, pays duties/VAT, presents the CoC, and is the party UNBS holds responsible for the product on the domestic market. Note this differs from the EU model: Uganda's responsible operator is the in-country importer under customs/UNBS rules, whereas the EU additionally provides for a manufacturer-appointed Authorised Representative where no EU importer exists — Uganda's framework is centred on the importer of record rather than a formal AR mandate. Exporters should formalise the importer relationship, ensure the importer can support import inspection and any recall/corrective action, and align commercial and conformity documentation (invoice, CoC, test reports) to the importer named at clearance.
gap.zh: 无中国类似规定的结构性差距：中国电冰箱制造商在没有乌干达本地进口责任主体的情况下，无法将货物投放乌干达市场。进口商（持URA TIN）办理海关申报、缴纳关税/增值税、出示CoC，并是UNBS就产品在国内市场所追责的主体。注意这与欧盟模式不同：乌干达的责任运营主体是海关/UNBS规则下的在地进口商，而欧盟在无欧盟进口商时另设制造商委任的授权代表——乌干达框架以进口责任主体为核心，而非正式的授权代表授权。出口商应正式确立进口商关系，确保进口商能支持进口检验及任何召回/纠正措施，并使商业及符合性文件（发票、CoC、检测报告）与清关时载明的进口商保持一致。
gap.zht: 無中國類似規定的結構性差距：中國電冰箱製造商在沒有烏干達本地進口責任主體的情況下，無法將貨物投放烏干達市場。進口商（持URA TIN）辦理海關申報、繳納關稅/增值稅、出示CoC，並是UNBS就產品在國內市場所追責的主體。注意這與歐盟模式不同：烏干達的責任運營主體是海關/UNBS規則下的在地進口商，而歐盟在無歐盟進口商時另設製造商委任的授權代表——烏干達框架以進口責任主體為核心，而非正式的授權代表授權。出口商應正式確立進口商關係，確保進口商能支持進口檢驗及任何召回/糾正措施，並使商業及符合性文件（發票、CoC、檢測報告）與清關時載明的進口商保持一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice — a Uganda-registered importer of record (URA TIN) is required to clear and place goods on the Uganda market and is the party answerable to UNBS for product conformity
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement — Chinese export manufacturers have no statutory obligation under Chinese law to appoint a destination-country importer of record

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Uganda-resident importer of record (with a URA TIN) is required in practice to clear and place refrigerators on the Uganda market and is the party UNBS holds responsible for conformity. Unlike the EU's Authorised Representative model, Uganda centres responsibility on the in-country importer. Chinese exporters must formalise this importer relationship and align the CoC and commercial documents to the importer named at clearance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在实务中，须有乌干达本地进口责任主体（持URA TIN）方可清关并将电冰箱投放乌干达市场，且其为UNBS就符合性追责的主体。与欧盟授权代表模式不同，乌干达以在地进口商为责任核心。中国出口商须正式确立该进口商关系，并使CoC及商业文件与清关时载明的进口商保持一致。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在實務中，須有烏干達本地進口責任主體（持URA TIN）方可清關並將電冰箱投放烏干達市場，且其為UNBS就符合性追責的主體。與歐盟授權代表模式不同，烏干達以在地進口商為責任核心。中國出口商須正式確立該進口商關係，並使CoC及商業文件與清關時載明的進口商保持一致。
